top_signals.title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS – SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
top_signals.summary: What a week! One of the biggest and busiest Posidonia events ever. With the majority of shipping sectors enjoying healthy market conditions, the global maritime community gathered in Athens for a week of meetings, networking, celebrations, and strategic discussions. The overall sentiment was positive, with market participants expressing optimism that supportive fundamentals will continue to ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
